reasons: Bundle convention: one thin orchestrator at artifacts/recipe.json (11 nodes: pre_conditions + 10 bundle calls + done + teardown) + 10 task-local subflows under artifacts/recipe-flows/ invoked via explicit bundle/<name> refs. Validator (validate-flow-schema.js resolveBundledFlowRef) and runtime resolver (ext-bridge.js handleCall) both resolve bundle/<name> → <taskArtifactsDir>/recipe-flows/<name>.json.

Every subflow is self-runnable AND generically parametrized. Each exposes inputs (symbol, side, sideLabel, amount where applicable) and delegates the entire form-open prelude to the new shared canonical flow `perps/open-order-form` (ensure-perps-network → prime-perps-state → navigate-to-market-detail → close-position → wait-{side}-cta → press-{side} → wait-order-form). `validate-recipe.js --recipe artifacts/recipe-flows/<acN>.json --cdp-port <port>` runs each AC in isolation without the main recipe. Same subflow validates any (symbol,side) combination without duplication — e.g. ac5-valid-amount asserts `Open {{sideLabel}} {{symbol}}`, ac7-enter-submit-success regex `/{{sideLabel}}\s+\d+(?:\.\d+)?x/` and route lock `#/perps/market/{{symbol}}`.

AC7 positive adopts the canonical resilient idempotent pattern from domains/perps/flows/open-long-position.json: pre_conditions + balance gate (perpsGetAccountState totalBalance>0) + branch-position — if an ETH position already exists from a prior run, treat as prior AC7 proof and skip resubmission; otherwise the full Enter-to-submit path fires (switch-market → type $15 → focus → key_press Enter → wait-market-detail → state-based wait on perpsGetPositions until ETH position appears → DOM verify + direction regex + route lock + screenshot). State-based wait replaces raw DOM polling that previously hit 45s timeouts.

All acceptance criteria (AC1/AC2/AC3/AC5/AC6/AC7) bound to named subflows with ac<N>- prefix. AC7 negative reuses a single ac7-enter-blocked-assert subflow — canonical standalone asserts the empty case; main recipe calls it once (the below-min pass is now in ac5-below-min's state-verification chain rather than a duplicate call, to avoid double-close overhead).

AC7 positive proof is UI-success-state driven AND backend-state driven (not a network probe): redirect to perps-market-detail-page + state wait on perpsGetPositions + DOM perps-position-cta-buttons + perps-position-leverage regex (/Long\s+\d+(?:\.\d+)?x/) + route hash locked to '#/perps/market/ETH' + form unmounted. AC7 negative asserts formMounted + hashStillNew + buttonStillDisabled triplet.
Visual claims (auto-focus, disabled button copy, placeholder, limit auto-focus, post-submit redirect) backed by both DOM assertions and evidence screenshots.

Live run on CDP 6662: main recipe 10/10 PASS in 30.8s. Individual ac7-enter-submit-success: 17/17 PASS in 4.5s (full Enter path: wait-position-in-state 2.3s via perpsGetPositions). Idempotent branch also verified: rerun with pre-existing ETH position → 6/6 PASS in 2.6s by branching to verify-position-dom.
better_version_guidance: Add a bundle/ac4-tab-key-navigation subflow using Input.dispatchKeyEvent Tab to assert focus progresses size → leverage → (limit). Tab sequence remains the only AC-adjacent keyboard behavior not live-covered.
Optional: emit a static bundle-index.md alongside artifacts/recipe-flows/ listing each subflow and its AC target for reviewer navigation.

bundle.layout: task-local bundle: artifacts/recipe-flows/ + bundle/<name> refs. Thin orchestrator + fully self-runnable subflows.

subflows.note: types $15 in prelude so input has a value for the blur+refocus+select-span proof
canonical standalone asserts empty-form Enter-blocked case
resilient idempotent. Pre-conditions + balance gate + branch-position + state-based wait on perpsGetPositions. Mirrors canonical perps/open-long-position.

subflows.ac: Leverage (added during PR — not in original AC list)

bundle.rationale: User requested (1) task-local bundle format with bundle/<name> refs, (2) resilient idempotent order-submit pattern like domains/perps/flows/open-long-position, (3) each subflow runnable manually in isolation. Subflows now include their own setup block + form-open prelude so they can be validated individually via validate-recipe.js. Main recipe simplified to pure orchestration + guarded teardown.

ac_to_node_binding.reason: Every AC maps to a named subflow (bundle/ac<N>-*). Setup plumbing uses setup-*, screenshots use filename evidence-<label>. AC7 has positive (bundle/ac7-enter-submit-success) + negative (bundle/ac7-enter-blocked-assert) coverage.

assertion_rigor.reason: Every subflow's proof node uses strict eq or regex match. ac1 asserts activeElement testid. ac2 polls selectionStart==0 && selectionEnd==length. ac3 asserts placeholder string. ac5/ac6 assert disabled + textContent pairs. ac7-enter-blocked-assert asserts formMounted + hashStillNew + buttonStillDisabled. ac7-enter-submit-success asserts leftOrderForm + onMarketDetail + positionLive + directionIsLong + onEthRoute AND waits on perpsGetPositions state until the ETH position appears. Any regression to autoFocus, useEffect, disabled, or form-submit wiring flips at least one assertion to fail.

bundle_composition.reason: Main recipe is a pure orchestrator: pre_conditions + 10 bundle calls + guarded teardown. No inline assertion logic. Each subflow is individually schema-validatable AND individually runnable via validate-recipe.js (verified live: ac7-enter-submit-success ran standalone 17/17 PASS in 4.5s, 6/6 PASS on idempotent-skip branch in 2.6s).

ui_success_proof.reason: AC7 positive uses the canonical resilient idempotent pattern. UI success is proven inside bundle/ac7-enter-submit-success by wait_for perps-market-detail-page (15s cap) → wait_for on perpsGetPositions state until the ETH position appears (45s cap, 750ms poll) → wait_for perps-position-cta-buttons (15s cap) → wait_for perps-position-leverage matching /Long\s+\d+(?:\.\d+)?x/ (15s cap) → eval_sync asserting all five conditions. State-based wait replaces the prior DOM-only poll that hit 45s timeouts on testnet. Direction regex proves long-vs-short wiring survived the submit.

resilience_and_idempotency.reason: ac7-enter-submit-success mirrors domains/perps/flows/open-long-position canonical structure: pre_conditions (wallet.unlocked, perps.feature_enabled, perps.ready_to_trade, perps.sufficient_balance), setup (call perps/prime-perps-state, call perps/navigate-to-market-detail), entry gate (perpsGetAccountState totalBalance>0), branch-position (if ETH position already exists → verify-position-dom → pass; else full submit path). Live-verified idempotent: first run with no position → 17/17 PASS full Enter path; rerun with pre-existing position → 6/6 PASS by branching to verify. State-based wait on perpsGetPositions tolerates testnet order-placement latency without relying on DOM timing.

self_runnable_subflows.reason: Every subflow carries its own pre_conditions + setup via a single `{ call: perps/open-order-form }` step that encapsulates ensure-net → prime → nav → close → open-form. No inline prelude nodes. This lets reviewers run `validate-recipe.js --recipe recipe-flows/<ac>.json --cdp-port 6662` for any subflow in isolation — no main-recipe dependency, no hidden state inheritance.

generic_parametrization.reason: Every subflow declares explicit `inputs` with sensible defaults (symbol=ETH, side=long, sideLabel=Long, amount per AC). Hardcoded asset/side references eliminated from assertions: ac5-valid-amount button copy is `Open {{sideLabel}} {{symbol}}`, ac7-enter-submit-success direction regex is `/{{sideLabel}}\s+\d+(?:\.\d+)?x/`, route lock is `#/perps/market/{{symbol}}`. Same subflow file validates BTC short or any other pair without copy/duplication. The shared `perps/open-order-form` canonical flow also exposes symbol/side/network/provider as inputs so composition is uniform.

canonical_flow_extraction.reason: Extracted a new canonical flow `perps/open-order-form` under temp/agentic/recipes/domains/perps/flows/open-order-form.json. Inputs: {symbol, side, network, provider}. Composition: existing perps/ensure-perps-network + perps/prime-perps-state + perps/navigate-to-market-detail + perps/close-position, then parameterized CTA press (wait-{side}-cta → press-{side} → wait-order-form). All 10 AC subflows delegate the entire form-open prelude to this one call — no duplication. Main recipe orchestrator stays thin (pre_conditions + 10 bundle calls + guarded teardown).

screenshot_coverage.reason: Four evidence screenshots captured by the relevant subflows and stored next to the main recipe: evidence-min-order-empty (ac6-empty-button), evidence-valid-amount (ac5-valid-amount), evidence-limit-autofocus (ac1-limit-autofocus), evidence-enter-submit-redirect (ac7-enter-submit-success).

forbidden_patterns.reason: No switch-default-around-AC, no eval_sync skip-reason emission, no wait>500ms substitute for wait_for, no ad-hoc CDP where a flow exists. Setup in every subflow calls perps/close-position unconditionally (no-op if no position) so a flake in DOM position-detection cannot drop the close step.

flow_reuse.reason: Every subflow now delegates the complete form-open prelude to the shared canonical `perps/open-order-form` flow (single `{call}` in setup). That canonical flow itself composes perps/ensure-perps-network + perps/prime-perps-state + perps/navigate-to-market-detail + perps/close-position. Bundled subflows under recipe-flows/ contain only new keyboard-UX assertions that no prior flow covers. AC7 positive mirrors the canonical perps/open-long-position idempotent shape node-for-node in its branch structure.

teardown_safety.reason: Main recipe teardown calls perps/close-position unconditionally — that flow has its own ext_check_dom branch that makes it a no-op when no position is visible, so the teardown never errors on a non-existent position.

observability.reason: Main recipe run produced recipe-issues-review with status 'review' (non-gating): 1 warning, 2 errors, 0 exceptions (40x 'Unknown action Object' on home, 12x 'Sentry not initialized' in sw, 12x 'WebSocketRequestError: AbortError' in sw). All pre-existing testnet/env noise unrelated to keyboard-UX changes.

schema_validity.reason: validate-flow-schema.js passes on main recipe AND all 10 subflows. validate-recipe.js --dry-run prints the full main graph with no cycles/unreachable/missing. Live run with --cdp-port 6662: main recipe 10/10 PASS in 30.8s; ac7-enter-submit-success standalone 17/17 PASS in 4.5s; ac7-enter-submit-success idempotent-skip branch 6/6 PASS in 2.6s.

contextual_findings.message: Recipe uses the task-local bundle convention: subflows live flat under artifacts/recipe-flows/ and are invoked via bundle/<name> refs. Both validate-flow-schema.js (resolveBundledFlowRef in catalog.js) and the runtime call handler (handleCall in ext-bridge.js) resolve bundle/<name> → <taskArtifactsDir>/recipe-flows/<name>.json. No app code changes.

ac7-enter-submit-success now mirrors the canonical perps/open-long-position pattern end-to-end: pre_conditions + balance gate via perpsGetAccountState + branch-position idempotent switch (hasPosition → verify-and-pass; else full submit path) + state-based wait via perpsGetPositions instead of DOM-only polling. Fixes the prior 45s wait-position-live timeout that was misattributed to testnet flake — root cause was DOM polling too narrow to absorb testnet order-placement latency. State-based wait typically resolves in <3s.

Every AC subflow now includes its own pre_conditions + setup (ensure-net + prime + nav + close) + form-open prelude (wait-{side}-cta + press-{side} + wait-order-form) before the AC proof. Reviewers can run any subflow in isolation via validate-recipe.js. Main recipe simplified to pure orchestration.

Extracted `perps/open-order-form` canonical flow as the one-stop form-open prelude for every subflow. Subflows no longer repeat the 5-step setup + 3-step CTA dance; they `call: perps/open-order-form {symbol, side}` and focus on the AC proof. This converted each subflow from ~8 prelude nodes to a single setup line and made symbol/side fully parametric.

All subflows expose symbol/side/amount/sideLabel inputs with defaults. Hardcoded `Long`/`ETH`/`#/perps/market/ETH` replaced with `{{sideLabel}}`/`{{symbol}}`/`#/perps/market/{{symbol}}`. ac5 button copy `Open {{sideLabel}} {{symbol}}` validates BTC short without edits. Defaults preserve existing main-recipe runs; overrides let reviewers verify any (symbol,side) pair from the same files.

suggested_recipe_delta: Add bundle/ac4-tab-key-navigation subflow using Input.dispatchKeyEvent Tab to assert focus progresses size → leverage → (limit) when in limit mode. Tab sequence is the only AC-adjacent keyboard behavior not live-covered.
Optional: add a small bundle-index.md alongside artifacts/recipe-flows/ listing each subflow's AC target for reviewer-facing navigation.
Consider removing the legacy temp/agentic/recipes/domains/tat-2802/flows/ copies now that the task-local bundle is authoritative.
learned_flake_modes: perpsGetAccountState does NOT return a positions array (it returns only totals like totalBalance/uPnL). Use perpsGetPositions for position enumeration. Original AC7 used the wrong method and always saw positionsCount=0 even when a position was open.

perps-position-size-value can lag perps-position-leverage — size textContent may be empty for 15s+ after market-detail mount while direction text is already stable. Do not gate proofs on size-text; use direction-text regex.

ac2 select-on-focus relies on the amount-input onFocus handler calling e.target.select() synchronously. Programmatic blur/refocus + poll catches handler regressions but would false-fail if the implementation switched to native browser semantics (native .focus() does not auto-select).
